summary: Tested 4 new No-Show Analytics features: Channel Loss Analytics, Overbooking Heatmap, Rule Engine, and No-Show Prediction. All 24 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - all 4 tabs render correctly with proper data display, tab navigation works, period selectors functional.
features_tested: GET /api/pms/channel-loss-analytics - Returns channel breakdown, top3 worst, trend data, data quality
GET /api/pms/channel-loss-analytics?days=7/30/90 - Period selector works correctly
GET /api/pms/overbooking-heatmap - Returns heatmap data, peak days, weekly pattern, channel overlay
GET /api/pms/overbooking-heatmap?days=30/90 - Period selector works correctly
GET /api/pms/alert-rules - Lists all alert rules (2 existing rules found)
POST /api/pms/alert-rules - Creates new alert rule with all fields
DELETE /api/pms/alert-rules/{rule_id} - Deletes rule, returns 404 for non-existent
PATCH /api/pms/alert-rules/{rule_id}/toggle - Toggles rule active/inactive state
POST /api/pms/alert-rules/evaluate - Evaluates rules against metrics, returns alerts
GET /api/pms/alert-rules/history - Returns trigger history
GET /api/pms/noshow-prediction - Returns predictions with risk scores 0-100
GET /api/pms/noshow-prediction?days_ahead=7/14 - Days ahead selector works
Frontend: /no-show-analytics page loads with 4 tabs
Frontend: Tab navigation (Kanal Loss, Overbooking Heatmap, Kural Motoru, Tahmin) works
Frontend: Channel Loss tab shows summary cards, top 3 worst, detail table, trend chart
Frontend: Heatmap tab shows heatmap grid, peak days, weekly pattern, data quality warning
Frontend: Rule Engine tab shows rules list, add/delete/toggle buttons, evaluate button
Frontend: Prediction tab shows risk summary cards, predictions table, historical rates
Frontend: Data quality banner displays on each tab with appropriate confidence level
Frontend: Period select works on Channel Loss and Heatmap tabs

minor.issue: Returns mixed alert types (observability alerts + rule engine alerts) from same collection. Frontend expects rule_name field but observability alerts have alert_type/title/message instead.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows empty rows with just 'deger:' text when history contains observability alerts (which lack rule_name field). Should either filter to only show rule engine alerts or handle different alert types gracefully.

issues: i18n translation keys showing as raw text (common.welcome, auth.signIn, etc.) - pre-existing issue from iteration 170/171

backend.test_heatmap_data_quality: PASSED - Low confidence due to no overbooking data
backend.test_create_rule: PASSED - Rule created with all fields
backend.test_evaluate_rules: PASSED - 2 rules evaluated, 0 alerts (metrics below thresholds)
backend.test_cleanup_test_rules: PASSED - Cleaned up TEST_ prefixed rules

frontend.4_tabs_present: PASSED - Kanal Loss, Overbooking Heatmap, Kural Motoru, Tahmin
frontend.channel_loss_tab: PASSED - Summary cards, top 3 worst, detail table, trend chart
frontend.heatmap_tab: PASSED - Heatmap grid, peak days, weekly pattern, data quality warning
frontend.rules_engine_tab: PASSED - Rules list, add/delete/toggle, evaluate button
frontend.prediction_tab: PASSED - Risk summary, predictions table, historical rates
frontend.period_selector: PASSED - Works on Channel Loss and Heatmap tabs
frontend.tab_navigation: PASSED - All tabs clickable and switch content

action_items: MINOR: Fix Tetikleme Gecmisi (Trigger History) display in Rules Engine tab - currently shows empty rows for observability alerts that lack rule_name field. Either filter to only show rule engine alerts or handle different alert types.
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 new features are fully functional with proper data quality indicators
Rule Engine operates in Shadow Mode (alert/suggestion only, no automatic writes) - this is correct behavior
No overbooking data exists in the system, so Heatmap shows low confidence warning - expected
Prediction shows 5 upcoming bookings all with low risk (scores 18-26) - all from Direct channel
Channel Loss shows Exely with 44.4% no-show rate (4 out of 9 bookings) vs Direct 2.6% (21 out of 808)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_pms_analytics_4features.py - Created comprehensive test file for all 4 features
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (25 no-shows, 2 alert rules, 5 upcoming bookings)
context_for_next_testing_agent: No-Show Analytics 4-feature page is fully functional. Channel Loss shows 7,500 TL loss from 25 no-shows (Direct: 21, Exely: 4). Overbooking Heatmap shows 0 overbookings (low confidence). Rule Engine has 2 pre-existing rules (Yuksek Overbooking, No-Show Orani Yuksek) - neither triggered because metrics are below thresholds. Prediction shows 5 upcoming bookings all low risk. Minor UI issue: Trigger History shows empty rows for non-rule-engine alerts.
